description_long: This mosque is a grand, rectangular structure with a large central courtyard surrounded by high walls and arched entrances. The most prominent feature is a massive turquoise dome at one end, flanked by two smaller domes and four slender minarets at the corners. The main entrance is an imposing iwan with a pointed arch, leading into the courtyard, which is lined with greenery and pathways. The walls and domes are finished in light stone with blue-green accents, and the architectural detailing suggests a blend of Central Asian and Persian influences. The mosque's layout is symmetrical, with the domes and minarets providing vertical emphasis and the courtyard offering open communal space. Decorative elements are subtle, with the focus on structural grandeur and harmonious proportions.
description: A large, rectangular mosque with a central courtyard, a prominent turquoise dome, four minarets, and arched entrances, finished in light stone and blue-green accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main iwan entrance, flanked by two smaller domes and the central courtyard beyond.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large turquoise dome, the courtyard's greenery, and the symmetrical arrangement of minarets.
description_view_2: Rear view with the main dome centered, two smaller domes visible, and the courtyard layout apparent.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the height of the main dome, the courtyard, and the architectural symmetry.
attribute_dome: Three domes are visible: one large central turquoise dome at the rear, and two smaller turquoise domes flanking the main entrance. All are rounded with smooth surfaces and prominent placement, with the main dome being the tallest and most visually striking.
attribute_minaret: Four minarets are present, one at each corner of the mosque. They are tall, slender, cylindrical, and rise above the main structure, with simple decorative bands and pointed tops.
attribute_islamic_geometric_patterns: Geometric patterns are visible on the main entrance iwan and around the arches, featuring tessellated star and arabesque motifs in blue and turquoise on beige stone surfaces.
attribute_arabic_calligraphy: No visible Arabic calligraphy can be discerned from the images.
attribute_architectural_style: Timurid (Central Asian Persian) style, characterized by large turquoise domes, tall minarets, pointed iwans, and geometric tilework.
